## fast-ci Results Report
**Overall Status**: FAILED (Exit code: 2)
The `make fast-ci` command ran multiple checks. Here's the breakdown:
### Passing Checks - **AGENTS.md standard**: PASSED - **CLAUDE.md pairing**: All 19 CLAUDE.md files properly paired with AGENTS.md (0 violations) - **Format Check**: 1745 files already formatted - **Prettier Check**: All matched files use Prettier code style - **Markdown Check**: OK - **Exec Reference Check**: `.claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md` is up to date - **Type Checking (ty)**: All checks passed - **Unit Tests (erk)**: 5866 passed, 8 skipped - **Tests (erk-dev)**: 138 passed - **Tests (erk-statusline)**: 123 passed - **Tests (erk-mcp)**: 50 passed
### Failing Checks
**Lint (ruff)**: Found 5 errors
All 5 errors are in `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/erk_slots/test_unassign_cmd.py`:
| Line | Issue | |------|-------| | 19 | `F821 Undefined name 'pytest'` - `@pytest.mark.skip(...)` decorator | | 86 | `F821 Undefined name 'pytest'` - `@pytest.mark.skip(...)` decorator | | 148 | `F821 Undefined name 'pytest'` - `@pytest.mark.skip(...)` decorator | | 243 | `F821 Undefined name 'pytest'` - `@pytest.mark.skip(...)` decorator | | 303 | `F821 Undefined name 'pytest'` - `@pytest.mark.skip(...)` decorator |
**Unit Tests (erk)**: 4 collection errors in the same file
The test file at `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/erk_slots/test_unassign_cmd.py` is missing the `import pytest` statement, causing `pytest.mark.skip` decorators to fail with `NameError: name 'pytest' is not defined`.
